name: Design task
about: Propose or work on a design, UX, accessibility, or brand task

---

## Design task

Describe the task.

## User need

Who is this for and what problem does it solve?

## Page/component affected

- Home
- Country page
- Legal tracker
- Organization directory
- Action hub
- Dossier generator
- Other

## Requirements

- [ ] Calm and credible tone
- [ ] Mobile-first
- [ ] Accessible contrast
- [ ] Keyboard accessible if interactive
- [ ] Low-bandwidth friendly
- [ ] Avoids graphic/shock imagery

## References or sketches

Add links/images if useful and licensed.

## Review needed

- [ ] Design review
- [ ] Accessibility review
- [ ] Product review
